center.name: Lago Escondido
center.summary: Lago Escondido是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Dark-faced ground tyrant，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dark-faced ground tyrant (Muscisaxicola maclovianus) is a small passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Chile, Peru, Uruguay, the Falkland Islands, possibly in Ecuador, and as a vagrant to Brazil.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The dark-faced ground tyrant (Muscisaxicola maclovianus) is a small passerine bird in the family Tyrannidae, the tyrant flycatchers. It is found in Argentina, Chile, Peru, Uruguay, the Falkland Islands, possibly in Ecuador, and as a vagrant to Brazil.Remsen, J
